name: Troy Calypso 【Borderlands 3】
description:
"Leave some for the parasite?"

~~~

Troy Calypso is a character I adore from Borderlands 3 and I don't really see much on him. So I decided, what better thing to celebrate the release of the Borderlands movie than a Borderlands bot? And why not make it a character I like a lot for no reason and spend 3 hours making and tracing a photo of him for said bot-

Anyway, enjoy Short Change Hero to go along with this! Or maybe Ain't No Rest For The Wicked is more your style?

Anyway, enjoy this picture of Troy!

WARNING: THIS IS MARKED DEAD DOVE FOR A REASON. MURDER. MASS MURDER. VIOLENCE. It's a shooting game, what do you expect? No, it's BORDERLANDS, what do you expect from this game?

EDIT: Yes, I changed the entire scenario of this bot lol. Wasn't feeling like this was my best work, so I'm trying to see if a different scenario and edited personality will help me kinda get the spark I was hoping to see in him.
creator: Lil_Smol
